title: tragacantha alexandrina
intro: Tragacantha alexandrina, also known as Alexandrian thistle, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its thistle-like appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha alexandrina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder for added medicinal benefits.
